mapper.insert:
SELECT BEEZ.generate_pk_auto('version') FROM dual
INSERT INTO version ( id, project_id, name, description, created_on, start_date, end_date, status, is_share ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{projectId}, #{name}, #{description}, SYSDATE, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{status}, #{isShare} )
mapper.update: UPDATE version SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, status = #{status}, is_share = #{isShare} WHERE id = #{id}
